summary: Compacted unified position cards by removing probability track bars, sparklines, and reasons rows.
Reduced pos-stats to exactly three boxes: Entry, Current, Confidence.
Removed duplicate Live PnL display from the stat grid while keeping the large PnL display in the badge column.
result: Dashboard server started successfully after the card compaction changes.
Position card template no longer renders probTrack, sparkline, or reasons tags, and PnL appears only once per card.
risks: Browser-side visual confirmation was not performed from here; verification was limited to successful server startup and template inspection.
